description:
Goal
Rename compiler::World execution-image fields and accessors so they describe the linked whole-program image rather than a source-language defmodule. This should remove the current collision between source modules and the linked execution module carried by World.

Signal
- World no longer exposes ambiguous `module` / `module_plan` names for the linked execution image.
- Callers, tests, and docs use the new linked-program terminology consistently.
- Formatting, clippy, and targeted compiler/module/codegen tests pass.

Strategy
1. Rename the World storage and accessors to linked-program terms.
2. Propagate the new names through callers, helpers, and docs.
3. Re-run the targeted verification matrix to catch any missed boundary references.

References
- src/compiler.rs
- src/lib.rs
- src/test_support.rs
- .agent/docs/modules.md
- .agent/docs/single-authoritative-plan.md
title: Rename World module fields to linked program terms
